docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY AMEN, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT HATFIELD, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE WAS $350.00 SERVED APR-01-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HATFIELD, ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARY AMEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERT HATFIELD IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMEN, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HATFIELD, ROBERT $3,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,825.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
